theme_and_archetype.description: Premium, authoritative, and cinematic. Elevates scrap recycling to a Fortune-500 asset management level. Uses Deep Navy Blue, Steel Grey, and Gold accents.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-tight

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#060B14] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#F0C420] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#D4AF37] border border-[#D4AF37]/50 px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 transition-all duration-300
buttons.glass: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

tables.header: text-sm font-semibold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-white/10 pb-4

inputs.default: w-full bg-[#060B14] border border-white/10 text-white px-4 py-3 focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] outline-none transition-all rounded-none
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-400 mb-2

interactive_and_motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling for premium momentum
interactive_and_motion.hover_effects: Cards subtly translate-y-[-4px] with gold border illumination
interactive_and_motion.page_transitions: Fade-in with slight upward Y translation using Framer Motion
interactive_and_motion.three_js_hero: Interactive 3D model of a luxury industrial truck on dark background with directional gold and blue ambient lighting. Mouse orbit enabled. If truck model unavailable, use abstract industrial 3D metal shards.
interactive_and_motion.tickers: Continuous horizontal scroll for Live Market Price updates using react-fast-marquee. Low opacity background, gold text.

media_urls.description: Industrial steel diamond plate texture. Use with heavy #060B14 overlay.
Aerial view of scrap yard, use in gallery or services.
Pile of old car engines, use in services or gallery.
Luxury corporate office, use for 'About Us' or 'Contact' section.
Modern corporate building facade, use for Contact/Godown.

specific_section_rules.hero: Must include Three.js canvas as background/right-side element. H1 text: 'India's Trusted Scrap Recycling Partner'. Subtext: 'We Buy All Types of Scrap at the Best Market Price'. Buttons grouped left-aligned.
specific_section_rules.ticker: Sticky directly under hero or bottom of screen. Shows 'COPPER: ₹700/kg (UP) | ALUMINIUM: ₹150/kg (DOWN)'.
specific_section_rules.live_price_table: Search bar top right. Columns: Category, Scrap Type, Previous Price, Today's Price, Trend (Green Up Arrow / Red Down Arrow).
specific_section_rules.services_grid: 30+ items represented efficiently (use a Bento grid for top categories, plus a 'View All' or horizontal scroll). Each card has an icon, title, short desc. Hover makes it glow gold.
specific_section_rules.pickup_form: Multi-step or clean single column. Must include file upload for photo/video. Shadcn UI form components customized to dark theme.
specific_section_rules.gallery: Masonry layout. Use Framer Motion for entrance. 3D tilt effect on hover for images.
specific_section_rules.contact_bar: Fixed floating bar at bottom or side. Icons for Call, WhatsApp, Email, Maps, Back to top, Dark Mode.
specific_section_rules.dashboard: Admin CMS dashboard. Use Shadcn sidebar, data tables, and card components. Secure JWT login.
specific_section_rules.language_ai: Multi-language toggle (EN/KN) in header. AI Chat widget floating at bottom right (above contact bar).

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='hero-cta-quote', data-testid='price-table-search'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: framer-motion, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, three, gsap, @studio-freight/lenis, @phosphor-icons/react, react-fast-marquee.
Configure Tailwind with the provided #060B14 dark navy and #D4AF37 gold palette.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts (Hero, Bento grids) to allow maximum creative freedom.
Implement Shadcn UI for structured components (Tables, Forms, Dashboard), customized heavily to match the Luxury Dark theme.
Include a <Canvas> element in the Hero for the 3D visual. Use @react-three/fiber.
Implement the live price ticker using react-fast-marquee.
Ensure dark mode toggle is functional, though Dark is the default premium state.
